projectName.x-prompt: Which project will this generator take care of?

parent.x-prompt: What is the parent feature id? (leave blank for none)

folder.x-prompt: Which folder should this feature belong to? (leave blank for none)

label.x-prompt: Provide a human-readable label for the feature (leave blank for none)

labelKey.x-prompt: Provide the i18n label key (leave blank for none)

directory.x-prompt: In which source directory should the feature be created? (leave blank for root)

path.description: Provide the optional path for the router if it differs from the name
path.x-prompt: Provide a custom router path if it differs from the feature name (leave blank to use name)

lazyModule.description: Provide the name of the module in case of lazy components
lazyModule.x-prompt: Provide the lazy module name if this feature is loaded lazily (leave blank for none)

categories.description: Provide a comma separated list of categories
categories.x-prompt: Provide a comma-separated list of categories (leave blank for none)

permissions.description: Provide a comma separated list of permissions
permissions.x-prompt: Provide a comma-separated list of required permissions (leave blank for none)

tags.description: Provide a comma separated list of tags
tags.x-prompt: Provide a comma-separated list of tags (leave blank for none)

i18n.description: Provide a comma separated list of required i18n namespaces
i18n.x-prompt: Provide a comma-separated list of required i18n namespaces (leave blank for none)

style.description: The file extension to be used for style files.

x-prompt.message: Which stylesheet format would you like to use?
